title: 6ft Christmas Candy Garland, Pastel Candy Garland Ornaments Transparent Bead Christmas Tree Decorations Pastel Xmas Ornaments for Fireplace Farmhouse Wall Hanging Decorations Indoor Party
features: 6Ft Candy Garland: this Christmas candy garland is approximately 6 feet (1.8 meters) long and comes in a variety of candy colors, creating a dreamy and sweet festive atmosphere; Brightly colored garland is a perfect touch for holiday trees, mantelpieces, and stair rails

Acrylic Material, with Stronger Transparency: the candy shape is made of high transparency acrylic material, smooth and comfortable to touch, wear and tear resistant, lightweight and easy to store and use, good resistance to fade, offering you a comfortable using experience; Support long-term storage and reuse, easy to store after use

Candy Color Scheme: candy garland contains a variety of candy color elements, with coordinated overall color matching; With the pastel candy garland, you will be sure to add a colorful, fun and sweet look to trim your Christmas tree; Or fill a glass bowl or canister with the candy garland for some holiday table centerpieces

Ideal Christmas Gift: this candy wreath is not only a highlight of holiday decoration, but also a creative Christmas gift; Sending Christmas wishes to family, friends, children, teachers, or neighbors

Versatile Uses: the Christmas tree decoration set can be applied on many places, such as wall, door, ceiling, mantel, staircase, Christmas tree, fireplace, wreath, photo backdrop, fence and more, making your home and party decoration show an eye-catching and fresh picture
description: Features: Convenient to operate: The colorful peppermint beaded garland has been threaded well in advance and ready to hang, you just need to hang it on any place you want directly without other operating steps, an easy and convenient way for you to use, adding more colors and finished touch to your party Shatterproof material: The Christmas candies garland is made of plastic material, which is anti-drop and wear-resistant, not easy to break, and is hand-stringed, solid and firm Specifications: Material: acrylic Color: pastel Size: 6ft Package includes: 1 Pcs Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays
